emails.subject: Semora-Koch-Coastal
emails.body: Semora-Koch-Coastal Jeff, Attached are the November 2001 WTI, Cushing positions for Sempra, Koch and Coastal.

emails.subject: RE: Semora-Koch-Coastal
emails.body: RE: Semora-Koch-Coastal What about all the other reports for any EGM counterparty. I'd like those as well.

emails.subject: RE: Semora-Koch-Coastal
emails.body: Jeff, Let me send you what I pieced together from Joel Bennett's position at COB last night my discussions with Peggy Rathmell and her slates. Give me just a couple of minutes. tm

emails.subject: RE: Semora-Koch-Coastal
emails.body: Whatever you've given to Louise with any EGM counterparties, I'd like so we're all on the same page. Jeff

emails.subject: RE: Semora-Koch-Coastal
emails.body: All Louise has is the file I just sent you Jeff. I will send you the entire November position as I understand it.

emails.subject: RE: Semora-Koch-Coastal
emails.body: Louise and I are confused as to what this report is.
